subject: [PATCH v7 08/20] nfsd: use RCU to protect fi_deleg_file

2026-06-16.patch_summary: This patch uses RCU (Read-Copy Update) to protect the fi_deleg_file pointer in the nfsd kernel module. The problem it solves is a race condition that can occur when multiple threads access the fi_deleg_file pointer concurrently, leading to a NULL pointer dereference. To fix this, the patch annotates the fi_deleg_file pointer with __rcu and converts all accessors to use RCU primitives. This prepares for a subsequent patch that will safely acquire a reference from the CB_NOTIFY callback path without holding the fi_lock lock.
